.exit
await g.name()
const g = await GCoin.attach("0xCcAe191Eee8EF1991179757e642e0448fA6a4c78")
const GCoin = await ethers.getContractFactory("GCoin")
exit
.exit
await gcoin.owner()
const gcoin = await GCoin.attach("0xCcAe191Eee8EF1991179757e642e0448fA6a4c78")
const GCoin = await ethers.getContractFactory("GCoin")
